data.neutralization_agent: Class B CO2 Fire Extinguisher / Dry Sand Sandbags

data.action_directive: Rotate the primary bypass valve handle exactly 90 degrees counter-clockwise.
data.expected_result: Line pressure telemetry stabilizes between 45 and 55 PSI.
data.critical_fault_action: Hit Emergency Cutoff Switch E-1 immediately and broadcast 'BREAK BREAK' on active comms channel.
